titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 70: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 70. (A.R. No. 299 of 1979.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, left-side of Brahmā niche, Nāgēśvara temple.

p.hi: Year 10. Mēsha, Bharaṇi Thursday, Solar eclipse = 981 A.D. April 7.

summary.p: Damaged at the end. Records a gift of 96 sheep for a perpetual lamp to the god Paramaśvāmi of Tirukkīḻkkōṭṭam in Tirukkuḍamukku, a dēvadānam in Pāmbūr-nāḍu on the northern bank by Ambalavaṉ Paḻuvūr Nakkaṉ alias Vikrama Chōḻa-Mārāyaṉ on the occasion of solar eclipse. The gift was entrusted to the care of four shepherds who agreed to measure out oil every month for burning the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparake
caripanmakki yāṇṭu pattāva
tu Ivvāṇṭu vaṭakaraip pāmpūrnāṭṭut tevatā
nam tirukkuṭamukkil tirukkiḻkkoṭṭattu parama
svāmikku Ivāṭṭai meṣanāyaṟṟu vicāḻakki
ḻamaiy peṟṟa paraṇi nāṉṟu suriyagarāṇattiṉ
potināl Ampalavaṉ paḻūvūr nakkanāṉa vikki
ramacoḻamārāyaṉ tirunoṉdā viḷakku +
(ṟu) Oṉṟinukku vaicca Āṭu 96 toṇ
ṇūṟṟu Āṟu Ivvūr ma tiya comāci ka
ṇṇaṉ kaṭava viḷakku (1/2) Araiyālum tiṅ
kaḷ muṉnāḻi muḻākku ney Aṭṭa kaṭavanāka
vum maṉṟāṭiy māteva ccilum Iva
ṉ tampiy mātevaṉ konum māte
vaṉ ciṟuppirānumāy kaṭavaviḷakku (1/2) Arai
Ālum tiṅkaḷ muṉ nāḻi muḻākku ne
y Aṭṭak kaṭavanākavum Itu śaṉ
tirātittaval paṉmāyeśvararakṣai
konum
kaṭava viḷak
damaged
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
